name: A. MOHAMED YASAR
title: Full Stack Engineer | React.js Architect | MERN Specialist | REST API Expert
summary: Innovative Full Stack Engineer with 2.5+ years of production-grade experience in architecting responsive, high-fidelity web ecosystems using React.js and the MERN stack. Expert at bridging the gap between sophisticated UI/UX requirements and robust backend logic. Proven track record in orchestrating complex REST API integrations, optimizing SQL database performance, and conducting deep-system debugging to maintain 99.9% uptime. Actively expanding technical horizons into Enterprise Java, Spring Boot, and Python-based automation to build the next generation of scalable, secure architecture.

tools: Advanced Postman Scripting for API Testing
aiTools: OpenAI API Integration & Smart Automation Workflows
AI-Driven Code Analysis & Unit Test Generation

description: Architected and maintained modular, high-performance UI components using React.js and Material UI, significantly reducing development cycle time for new feature deployments by 40%.

Engineered seamless integration between complex frontend modules and relational backend APIs, ensuring reliable data synchronization, handling race conditions, and maintaining high-fidelity user experiences.
Optimized legacy SQL queries and database schemas, implementing indexing strategies that resulted in a 60% marked improvement in data retrieval speeds and overall system responsiveness.

Led cross-functional 'Bug Strike Teams' to investigate and eliminate critical UI/API/Database bottlenecks, achieving a 30% reduction in post-deployment ticket volume through rigorous root-cause analysis.

Collaborated with QA and Core Development teams to orchestrate smooth application releases, including rigorous pre-production validation, regression testing scripts, and automated testing workflows for critical paths.

Authored comprehensive technical documentation for internal systems, including API contracts, sequence diagrams, and architecture maps, to facilitate faster developer onboarding and system transparency.
Implemented real-time data visualization dashboards for monitoring business KPIs, utilizing charting libraries and efficient data polling strategies.

projects.name: Job Planner Enterprise
description: Orchestrated the development of core UI modules for a high-traffic Job Management System, focusing on real-time task tracking, resource allocation, and automated scheduling logic.
Implemented advanced state management using Redux Toolkit to handle complex multi-step forms, persistent user sessions, and dynamic data filtering across thousands of records.
Collaborated on full-stack debugging initiatives to resolve critical production issues spanning the frontend layers, RESTful API middleware, and complex SQL backend stored procedures.
Spearheaded UI/UX modernizations and accessibility audits that improved operational efficiency by 15% and increased user satisfaction scores for enterprise clients across Australia.
Engineered a scalable notification system for real-time alerts on job status changes, integrating with backend event triggers.

projects.name: Cyber-Premium MERN Ecosystem
description: Architected a state-of-the-art personal engineering dashboard featuring real-time visitor tracking via WebSockets and persistent MongoDB storage with optimized indexing.
Implemented a secure Administrative Protocol for live data updates and system monitoring, featuring JWT-based authentication, protected API endpoints, and comprehensive action logging.
Developed a dedicated 'Architecture Documentation' portal with multi-language support (English/Tamil), dynamic machine translation integration, and Markdown-to-HTML rendering.
Automated deployment workflows using Render's CI/CD infrastructure, ensuring seamless builds from GitHub repository pushes with environment variable safety checks.
Designed a custom glassmorphic UI system using Material UI and Framer Motion for high-fidelity 3D parallax effects and smooth route transitions.
